⚠️ Automated direct links are blocked by airline anti-bot systems. You must search manually.

1

Go to the official portal:

https://www.miles-and-more.com/
2

Log in and select "Book with Miles/Points".

3

Search FRA to HYD on 2026-09-13.

4

Look for flights operated by 2L, AI, EN, LH, LX, OS.
